title: oldenlandia elatinoides
intro: Oldenlandia elatinoides, also known as Oldenlandia or Small White-eyed Oldenlandia, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is a traditional medicinal herb used in various cultures, particularly in Asia, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimalarial, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oldenlandia elatinoides include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential anti-cancer and anti-oxidant effects. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction, and in some regions, it is also used as a tincture or made into a poultice for topical application.
